text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Super Creek receives a letter from a young fan.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It says, "When I grow up, I want to be an
Umamusume just like you."

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You can see so many eraser smudges on the
paper.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I bet she poured her heart and soul into writing
this for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how adorable. I wonder what I should write
back in my thank you letter.
choice_data_list:
Maybe something like, "Let's run together one
day"?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, what a lovely dream she has.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There isn't much I can give to this child right
now...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I need to train my heart out so that we do end
up running together one day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day, Super Creek takes on her training
session with a smile on her face and a spring in
her step.
